title: Audit log → events recorded for all system actions
evidence: All 13 TC-015 tests passed in 1965ms (354/354 total tests across 51 files): - ✓ ACCESS_DENIED recorded when blocked user tries to provision (actor=system, tenant_id=null) - ✓ ACCESS_GRANTED recorded when allowlist entry added (actor=admin:tc015) - ✓ TENANT_PROVISIONED recorded on successful provision (actor=system) - ✓ TENANT_STARTED recorded when tenant starts via pollUntilHealthy mock (actor=system) - ✓ MESSAGE_DELIVERED recorded on successful message delivery (slackEventId in metadata) - ✓ TENANT_STOPPED recorded when tenant stopped (actor=system) - ✓ TENANT_DELETED recorded when tenant deleted (actor=admin) - ✓ ACCESS_REVOKED recorded when allowlist entry revoked (actor=admin) - ✓ GET /v1/admin/audit returns all 8 event types (total >= 8) - ✓ GET /v1/admin/audit?tenant_id=X returns events in descending created_at order - ✓ DELETE /v1/admin/audit → 404 (append-only) - ✓ PUT /v1/admin/audit → 404 (append-only) - ✓ PATCH /v1/admin/audit → 404 (append-only)
